glosses.yue: 到而家為止; 到目前為止

translations.en: So far everything has gone well.
translations.es: Hasta ahora todo ha salido bien.
translations.zh-Hans: 到目前为止，一切都很顺利。
translations.yue: 到而家為止，一切都好順利。
translations.tr: Şimdiye kadar her şey yolunda gitti.
translations.vi: Cho đến giờ mọi thứ đều suôn sẻ.
translations.ar: حتى الآن سارت الأمور على ما يرام.
translations.nl: Tot nu toe is alles goed gegaan.
translations.hi: अब तक सब कुछ ठीक रहा है।
translations.pl: Do tej pory wszystko szło dobrze.
translations.nb: Så langt har alt gått bra.
translations.ro: Până acum totul a mers bine.
translations.da: Indtil videre er alt gået godt.
translations.fi: Tähän mennessä kaikki on sujunut hyvin.
translations.ja: 今のところ、すべて順調です。

tokens.explanation: Expletive/dummy pronoun in clause-initial position; lacks a concrete referent and does not determine agreement.
Finite main verb (Präteritum, 3rd person singular) of an intransitive verb; predicates the clause.
Temporal adverb meaning ‘until now’; modifies the verb phrase.
Indefinite pronoun in nominative; syntactic subject (‘everything’).
Adverb of manner modifying the verb; expresses how things went.

sentences.target: Ich habe sie bisher nicht gesehen.

translations.de: Ich habe sie bisher nicht gesehen.
translations.en: I haven't seen her so far.
translations.es: Hasta ahora no la he visto.
translations.fr: Je ne l'ai pas encore vue.
translations.zh-Hans: 到目前为止，我还没见到她。
translations.yue: 到而家為止，我仲未見到佢。
translations.ru: Пока что я её не видел.
translations.vi: Đến giờ tôi vẫn chưa thấy cô ấy.
translations.nl: Tot nu toe heb ik haar niet gezien.
translations.uk: Поки що її не було видно.
translations.hi: अभी तक मैंने उसे नहीं देखा है।
translations.pl: Jak dotąd jej nie było widać.
translations.el: Μέχρι τώρα δεν την έχω δει.
translations.nb: Så langt har jeg ikke sett henne.
translations.sv: Hittills har jag inte sett henne.
translations.da: Indtil videre har jeg ikke set hende.
translations.fi: Tähän mennessä en ole nähnyt häntä.
translations.ja: 今のところ、彼女を见かけていません。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; clause subject.
Finite auxiliary (Präsens, 1st person singular) forming the Perfekt with a past participle.
Personal pronoun in accusative; direct object. Ambiguous (3rd person fem. sg., 3rd person pl., or formal ‘Sie’).
Temporal adverb ‘until now’; modifies the predicate.
Negation particle; scopes over the verb phrase.
Past participle; lexical main verb complementing the auxiliary to form the Perfekt.

translations.en: No one has called so far.
translations.zh-Hans: 到目前为止，还没有人打来电话。
translations.yue: 到而家為止，仲未有人打嚟。
translations.he: עד עכשיו אף אחד לא התקשר.
translations.vi: Đến giờ vẫn chưa ai gọi.
translations.nl: Tot nu toe heeft niemand gebeld.
translations.hi: अब तक किसी ने फोन नहीं किया है।
translations.pl: Do tej pory nikt nie dzwonił.
translations.el: Μέχρι τώρα δεν έχει καλέσει κανείς.
translations.id: Sejauh ini belum ada yang menelepon.
translations.ro: Până acum nu a sunat nimeni.
translations.fi: Tähän mennessä kukaan ei ole soittanut.
translations.ja: 今のところ、誰からも電話が来ていません。

tokens.explanation: Negative indefinite pronoun in nominative; clause subject.
Finite auxiliary (Präsens, 3rd person singular) used to form the Perfekt.
Temporal adverb ‘until now’; modifies the predicate.
Past participle of the separable verb ‘anrufen’; lexical main verb in the Perfekt (not split in participle form).

sentences.target: Mit dem Projekt bin ich bisher zufrieden.
sentences.reading: /mɪt deːm pʁoˈjɛkt bɪn ɪç bɪsˈheːɐ̯ tsuˈfʁiːdn̩/

translations.de: Mit dem Projekt bin ich bisher zufrieden.
translations.ipa: /mɪt deːm pʁoˈjɛkt bɪn ɪç bɪsˈheːɐ̯ tsuˈfʁiːdn̩/
translations.en: I'm satisfied with the project so far.
translations.es: Hasta ahora estoy conforme con el proyecto.
translations.fr: Pour l'instant, le projet me satisfait.
translations.it: Per ora il progetto mi soddisfa.
translations.zh-Hans: 到目前为止，我对这个项目很满意。
translations.yue: 到而家為止，我對呢個項目好滿意。
translations.pt: Até agora o projeto tem me agradado.
translations.vi: Đến giờ tôi hài lòng với dự án này.
translations.nl: Tot nu toe ben ik tevreden over het project.
translations.uk: Поки що цей проєкт мене влаштовує.
translations.hi: अभी तक मैं इस परियोजना से संतुष्ट हूँ।
translations.pl: Jak dotąd ten projekt mnie zadowala.
translations.el: Μέχρι στιγμής το έργο με ικανοποιεί.
translations.nb: Så langt er jeg fornøyd med prosjektet.
translations.id: Sejauh ini saya puas dengan proyek ini.
translations.sv: Hittills är jag nöjd med projektet.
translations.da: Indtil videre er jeg tilfreds med projektet.
translations.ja: 今のところ、このプロジェクトには満足しています。

tokens.explanation: Preposition selecting dative; introduces a prepositional phrase.
Definite article, dative neuter singular; determiner of ‘Projekt’.
Common noun; head of the prepositional phrase governed by ‘mit’ (dative case).
Copular auxiliary (Präsens, 1st person singular); links the subject with the predicate adjective.
Personal pronoun, nominative; grammatical subject.
Temporal adverb ‘until now’; modifies the predicate.
Predicate adjective; complement of the copula ‘bin’ describing the subject’s state.
